📌 FinOps for AI Systems

Most engineers think AI cost optimization is just about monitoring a finance dashboard 📊.

But I was wrong - it's a product architecture problem that requires a thoughtful approach 🤔.

Here are the key strategies:

I finally understood that a well-designed flow can make all the difference 📈. It took me years to learn that throwing more resources at the problem isn't the answer 💸.

You can control AI costs without killing product quality by implementing these strategies 🚀.

💬 Which strategy do you use to optimize AI costs? #SystemDesign #DistributedSystems #SoftwareArchitecture #SystemDesign #SystemDesign
